ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "ship_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "ship_mode" TEXT /* Shipping method used */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Market segment the customer belongs to */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "fulfillment_date" TEXT /* Date the order was fulfilled */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "segment" TEXT /* Market segment the customer belongs to */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the customer is located */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program" INTEGER /* Loyalty program membership status of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level of the product */,
  "category_hierarchy" TEXT /* Category hierarchy of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier FOREIGN KEY ("supplier") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_details" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales amount for the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit made from the product */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage applied to the product */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the supplier */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, customer service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status_history" (
  "order_id" TEXT /* Reference to the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order at the time of update */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date the status was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "status_date")
)
